e6a43ea877082823.author: Durga Rajasre B
e6a43ea877082823.text:
Had a really good experience with Sathya Agency while purchasing a phone.

We first contacted them on May 9 around 7:30 PM, and Mr. Rajesh, the manager, coordinated extremely well and helped us get the exact phone we were looking for along with a good discount.

The next day, we visited the store and completed the purchase smoothly. The overall customer service was excellent. They also provided us with a charger and gifted us Zebronics wireless headphones, which was a really nice gesture.

A special mention to Ms. Saraswathi, who assisted us at the store. She was very friendly, polite, and made the entire purchase experience comfortable and pleasant.

Overall, we are very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Sathya Agency, Thiruchendur for their customer support and professionalism.

d62ca05b8e8c2700.author: Reegan R
d62ca05b8e8c2700.text:
Recently I purchased a AC and a Wrong commitment given by the salesperson Mr Prabhakar to whom I fooled in sathya Udangudi branch.

While purchasing he told me the concern service engineer from Voltas will come for the instalation and no need to pay for installation, except other accessories.and except third party service engineers installation visit.i said I need a technical team for installation only from the Voltas.

During the AC service engineers came from Kayalpattinam visited for an installation, once completed he asked for a installation charge of Rs.1650/-, i said them from udangudi sathya agency told there will be a free installation charge. During my booking as said by prabhakar( sales person).
I  contacted prabhakar ,asked about his commitment,he said I haven't said anything like that,he started arguing with me,
He did cut the call and didn't picked my call,even I tried many a times to the concern number branch number given in the bill.but there's no response from them.

This is how I experienced from the renowned brand Sathya Udangudi Branch.

For achieving target sales strategy a lots of hidden lies beyond this.
Be aware If any one visiting there,get a acknowledgement or hand written about the  product details.

57f7f27f4a5ad662.author: Ravi Kumar
57f7f27f4a5ad662.text: They have a variety of laptop models and are super value for money and many laptop models available in a price cheaper than in online. The problem comes when you try to buy a laptop in EMI. If you try to buy a laptop in any brand other than HP they will only have EMI options with high interest rate. The interest rate is so high that if you buy a 60k laptop the internet you pay for EMI will be 10k or higher than that. If you try to buy any other laptop in that budget without interest the only brand available will be HP but in that budget they don't have a model in HP brand which has good specs for given rate. They should solve this problem and try to give no cost EMI options for all laptop brands. If you are buying a laptop in ready cash this shop is highly recommend than amazon, flipkart, etc.

Within just 1 year, I had to call for service 8 times because of repeated issues. We earn money through hard work, but spending it in this showroom turned out to be a complete waste. There is no proper response, no customer satisfaction, and very poor after-sales service.

If there was an option to give zero stars, I would definitely give that.

One of the worst showrooms in Valliyur. I would never recommend this place to anyone.

e84a5d024250075f.author: Jacob
e84a5d024250075f.text:
Pathetic after-sales service - 1 month plus without resolution

Bought a Haier fridge from Sathya branch over a month ago. It was installed at my home, but the compressor stopped working within a few days.I contacted the branch immediately. They inspected it, confirmed the compressor was faulty, and promised a replacement fridge within the next week.

It’s been over a month now. I’ve called them multiple times but they keep delaying with no clear update. Still no replacement, no proper resolution.

For such an expensive appliance, this kind of after-sales service is unacceptable. If you’re buying from Sathya, beware of what happens if your product fails. Regret my purchase.

42bbfa125ce76db7.author: Prem K
42bbfa125ce76db7.text:
I recently purchased a refrigerator from Satya Agencies; the product was delivered directly from the warehouse(obviously a different piece). Excitingly, I turned it on, and a day later, I noticed an issue.
Anxiously, I called the store sales agent, Saranya, who had sold the product, and asked for a replacement instead of a repair; she asked me to come to the store. The next day, when I walked to the store, she took us to the manager, who gladly gave us a few options.
Since the store didn't hold that exact model, the manager agreed and gave us full freedom to switch to a different product.
Truly a fantastic experience and a great customer satisfaction!
To the Store manager and Saranya, I thank you very much.
I wish for the store's exponential growth and great success!

New review 30.5.26

⭐⭐⭐⭐☆
I had a cooling issue with my LG Split AC and was concerned about the delay in service. However, Sathya Agencies, Ambasamudram Manager Mr. Bhaskar personally spoke with me and helped arrange an LG service visit for my AC cooling issue.
I appreciate Mr. Bhaskar and the Sathya Agencies staff for their follow-up and support. I would also like to thank LG Global for responding to my posts on social media and helping move the issue forward.
The issue is now being attended to, and I appreciate the efforts taken by both Sathya Agencies and LG. I hope the service process continues to improve for customers in the future.

08587d5a740a1b6b.author: V. Meena
08587d5a740a1b6b.text:
I had a very good experience with Sathya Agencies. The showroom offers a wide range of products, including mobile phones, televisions, home appliances, and various electronic items. The staff members are friendly, experienced, and always willing to help customers choose products that best suit their needs and budget.
The showroom is well-maintained, clean, and neatly organized, making it easy to browse and compare different products. The prices are competitive, and attractive offers, discounts, and financing options are frequently available. The billing process is simple and quick, while the customer service is generally excellent and supportive.
The quality of the products is impressive. Sathya Agencies has built a strong reputation for reliability and customer satisfaction over the years. Their delivery service is also satisfactory and efficient. Overall, my shopping experience was comfortable, convenient, and enjoyable.
Sathya Agencies is one of the leading electronics retail chains in Tamil Nadu. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking to purchase quality electronic products at reasonable prices. Overall, I am highly satisfied with their service and would be happy to shop there again in the future. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
